local_date_key.normalization_rule: Normalize against selected location timezone before computation.

location_id.normalization_rule: Must match an approved expanded location record.

timezone.normalization_rule: Timezone is resolved from the approved location record, not free user text.

required_calculation_steps.description: Convert local date/time anchor to astronomical day basis using location timezone.
Compute or derive apparent sidereal solar longitude under the selected ayanamsha policy.
Compute or derive apparent sidereal lunar longitude under the selected ayanamsha policy.
Calculate Moon-Sun angular separation and classify into 30 tithi divisions.
Classify tithi 1-15 as Shukla and 16-30 as Krishna, with transition rules held for AG74D implementation.
Classify lunar longitude into 27 nakshatra segments.
Classify Sun + Moon longitude sum into 27 yoga segments.
Classify half-tithi segment with fixed and repeating karana rules.
Provide location-aware sunrise/sunset basis under verified static approximation or lookup boundary.

unsupported_input_policy.unsupported_location: Return governed unsupported-location fallback; do not estimate production Panchang from free text.
unsupported_input_policy.invalid_date: Return invalid-date fallback; do not compute.
unsupported_input_policy.missing_timezone: Block computation until approved timezone exists.
unsupported_input_policy.missing_coordinates: Block computation until approved coordinates exist.
